# Autional — Identity for AI-Generated Applications

## Core Docs
- https://www.autional.com/features
- https://www.autional.com/pricing
- https://www.autional.com/docs
- https://www.autional.com/sdk
- https://www.autional.com/compare
- https://www.autional.com/about
- https://www.autional.com/faq
- https://www.autional.com/trust

## Blog (49 articles)
- https://www.autional.com/blog

## SDK Packages (31)
- @autional/core — npm install @autional/core
- @autional/react — npm install @autional/react @autional/core
- @autional/vue — npm install @autional/vue @autional/core
- @autional/next — npm install @autional/next @autional/core
- @autional/node — npm install @autional/node
- @autional/miniapp — WeChat Mini Program adapter
- @autional/react-native — React Native SDK
- @autional/plugin-mfa, @autional/plugin-passkey, @autional/plugin-tenant
- @autional/api-identity, @autional/api-mfa, @autional/api-oauth, @autional/api-session
- @autional/api-profile, @autional/api-tenant, @autional/api-rbac, @autional/api-billing
- @autional/api-audit, @autional/api-compliance, @autional/api-wallet, @autional/api-point
- @autional/api-pay, @autional/api-storage, @autional/api-notification, @autional/api-communication
- @autional/api-secret, @autional/api-status, @autional/api-saml, @autional/api-verification

## Architecture
- 24 microservices, 1,400+ REST APIs
- PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ
- Go backend, TypeScript/React frontend
- AGPL v3 open source — github.com/autional/authms

## Integrations
- OAuth 2.1, OIDC, SAML 2.0
- LDAP/AD, SCIM 2.0
- WebAuthn/FIDO2, TOTP, SMS, Email, Push MFA
- SM2/SM3/SM4 national cryptography
